2024 SUBARU OUTBACK CORROSION PROTECTION REQUIREMENTS
ALLDATA Collision Repair Procedures

Vehicle: 2024 Subaru Outback
Document Type: Corrosion Protection and Anti-Corrosion Treatment

CORROSION PROTECTION OVERVIEW
Subaru Corporation requires full corrosion protection restoration after any
collision repair affecting the 2024 Subaru Outback body structure. Failure
to restore corrosion protection may void Subaru corrosion warranty coverage.

SEALER APPLICATION
Apply weld-through primer to all bare metal flanges before welding per
Subaru anti-corrosion specification. Apply cavity wax injection to all enclosed
body cavities accessible after panel installation.

CAVITY WAX REQUIREMENTS
All enclosed cavities in the rear quarter panel area of the 2024 Subaru Outback
require cavity wax injection per Subaru cavity wax application procedure.
Use Subaru-approved cavity wax product or equivalent meeting Subaru specification.

ZINC PRIMER AND ANTI-CORROSION SEALER
1. Apply zinc-rich primer to bare metal at all weld flanges.
2. Apply seam sealer per Subaru seam sealer application diagram.
3. Apply anti-corrosion sealer to all joint areas per Subaru specification.
4. Apply cavity wax per Subaru cavity wax access hole locations.

PAINT AND REFINISH
Apply anti-corrosion primer coat before applying color coats. Use Subaru-approved
refinish materials. Refer to Subaru paint code and color match specification.

GALVANIZING NOTE
The 2024 Subaru Outback uses galvanized steel in multiple panel zones. Remove
galvanized coating from weld areas only. Re-apply zinc primer immediately
after weld completion. Subaru anti-corrosion requirements prohibit leaving
bare metal exposed.

FINAL INSPECTION
Verify corrosion protection is complete per Subaru inspection checklist.
All sealer applications must be fully cured before closing any panel.
Apply final cavity wax per Subaru documented access locations.
